title: Santa Soosiz
description: In this game you control Santa moving them around a world that revolves around you! As you move around the landscape your character clings o the ground via gravity – use it your advantage to move from one platform to the next. to collect all missing Gifts to save the Christmas! This is a fun Christmas theme exploring adventure games enjoy it!
instructions: W Up Space Jump A Left Move Left D Right Move Right Or use Touch controls
